item.title: A message from Mr. Kwok:
item.description: There will be a yearbook meeting this Friday at lunch in portable 316 for the design team.

item.title: A message to Staff from Mme. Perron
item.description: Please see a Europe team member, Mme Perron or one of the other teacher chaperones if you wish to purchase a charcuterie board for our Easter Fundraiser. All funds will help offset cost of student trip and boards will be delivered to you at the school on Thursday April 2nd. There are also 50/50 tickets in the main staffroom in partnership with the Russell Legion. Please see Mme Perron or a team member or teacher chaperone for more information.

item.title: A message from Mme. Perron:
item.description: There will be a unity club meeting today at 10:40 in room 127. All club members are asked to attend-especially the elevate and empower panelists. New members are also welcome.

item.title: A message from Mme. Perron
item.description: There will be a brief Europe team meeting on Thursday at 10:40 in room 125 this meeting will not be long. All travelers are asked to attend.

item.title: A message from Mr. Benoit:
item.description: There will be a meeting in room 247 at 11:20 for the grade 7 tier 1 hockey team

item.title: A message from Ms. Clouthier:
item.description: There will be a Grade 7 boys basketball try-out tomorrow (Thursday, February 19th) from 2:15-3:45pm and on Friday, February 20th there will be a Grade 8 boys basketball try-out from 2:15-3:45pm. Please see Ms. Clouthier if you cannot attend your grade's try-out time.

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: A big thank you goes out to all those students who helped out with yesterday’s pancake breakfast! You fired out those flapjacks like they were going out of style! Don’t forget to get your volunteer hours signed by Mr. Vonesch later today.
